Who is this for: All employees, managers, team leads, executives, administrative assistants, project managers, sales representatives, customer service representatives, HR professionals, anyone who uses workplace communication tools
Team or Dept this is for: IT, Legal, Compliance, HR, Operations, Communications, All departments
Description: Risks of using AI tools in meetings, chats, and internal communications.
Prerequisites: Learners should have a basic familiarity with everyday workplace communication tools (such as email, messaging platforms, or video conferencing software) and a general awareness that AI-powered features are increasingly built into these tools.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key risks associated with using AI tools in meetings, chats, and internal communications, and explain how sensitive or confidential information can be unintentionally exposed. You will also be able to apply practical strategies to protect organisational data and make informed decisions about when and how to use AI tools responsibly in the workplace.
